| MCP-05 | Server Authentication Bypass    |
| MCP-06 | Implicit Trust Between Servers  |
| MCP-07 | Configuration Injection         |
| MCP-08 | Insecure Data Storage           |
| MCP-09 | Insufficient Logging            |
